item.title: Project Sync 1.0.0
item.description:
Project Sync 1.0.0

New

  • First public release of Project Sync for scheduled one-way syncs between Mac folders, mounted network drives, and SSH-accessible machines.
  • Choose Backup mode to copy and update files without removing existing destination files, or Mirror mode when the destination should exactly match the source.
  • Preview changes before syncing, review plain-text logs and history, and cancel a running job when needed.
  • Schedule jobs manually, hourly, daily, weekly, or in response to changes in local and mounted-network folders.
  • Check for updates from the app menu, menu-bar menu, or Settings. Settings also lets you choose whether Project Sync checks for and downloads updates automatically.

Install & update

Existing users can use Check for Updates… in Project Sync.

New users: download Project-Sync-1.0.0.dmg, open it, and drag Project Sync to Applications.

item.title: Project Sync 1.1.0
item.description:
Project Sync 1.1.0

New

  • Add a Real-time schedule for Mac folders and mounted network drives. Project Sync syncs changes after the source has been quiet for two seconds.
  • Real-time jobs run once when watching begins to catch up on changes made while Project Sync or the source was unavailable. If files change during a sync, one follow-up sync is queued.
  • See real-time job status in the dashboard, including when a watcher is active, paused, or waiting for an unavailable source to return.

Fixed

  • Prevent creating a local or network sync when the source and destination folders contain one another, avoiding unsafe recursive copies.

Changed

  • Real-time watching is available for Mac folders and mounted network drives, including when syncing to an SSH destination. Remote SSH sources continue to use manual or timed schedules.

Install & update

Existing users can use Check for Updates… in Project Sync.

New users: download Project-Sync-1.1.0.dmg, open it, and drag Project Sync to Applications.
